hero.title: A1 Motor Park
hero.subtitle: 3.91 km · 15 turns · 25 pit boxes · 585 m altitude
hero.intro: Bulgaria's first FIA-homologated circuit, opened 21 March 2026 in Samokov.

calendar.subtitle: Every event on the track — filter by category, month, or whether it's already happened.
calendar.empty: No events match. Try a different filter.

featured.title: Events
featured.subtitle: Experience racing, rallies, supercars and so much more at Bulgaria's first FIA Grade 3 circuit.

categories.cars: Track championships, cup series and GT races.
categories.moto: Motorcycle racing, track days and riding schools.
categories.endurance: Long-format racing and the BES 999 six-hour round.
categories.rally: Rallies, recce stages and supercar tours.

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.subtitle: 14 points of interest, from the main gate to the paddock.

about.title: About A1 Motor Park
about.body: A1 Motor Park is the first fully FIA-homologated circuit on the Balkan Peninsula. Set at the foot of the Rila mountains near Samokov, 3.91 km long with 15 turns, it is the new home of Bulgarian motorsport.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Reach us for information, partnerships, or track rentals.
contact.formIntro: Send us a message and we'll get back to you shortly.
contact.formSuccess: Thanks — we'll be in touch shortly.

partners.title: Partners & sponsors
partners.intro: The A1 Motor Park family — the teams, clubs and brands racing with us through 2026 and beyond. Click any logo to visit.

upcomingEvents.title: Upcoming events
upcomingEvents.subtitle: What's headed to the track next.

pastEvents.title: Past events
pastEvents.subtitle: What the track has already seen this season.

trackDays.title: Open track days
trackDays.intro: Drive at your own pace on Bulgaria's first FIA Grade 3 circuit. Minimum 6 sessions × 18-20 minutes depending on the number of participants.

card.autoDescription: Open day Auto at A1 Motor Park is the open-track format on the newest and only FIA & FIM certified circuit in Bulgaria. Drive your own car at your own pace on a wide-open track.
card.motoDescription: Open day Moto at A1 Motor Park is the open-track format on the newest and only FIA & FIM certified circuit in Bulgaria. Ride your own bike at your own pace on a wide-open track.

before.heading: Before you arrive
before.i1: Each participant must hold a valid driver's licence for the vehicle they bring.
before.i2: Download the disclaimer; bring it filled in to reception.
before.i4: The vehicle must be in good technical condition.
before.i6: No own machine? Get in touch — rentals are available.

included.heading: What's included
included.i3: Marshals on track throughout the event.
included.i5: Access to café, restaurant and complex amenities.
